title: Smooth Mouse Click
description: Smooth Mouse Click Sound 99% Better Then Vannila Smooth Sound You Love This Sound! Download And Enjoy!
body:
Smooth Click Sound🎵

Tired of the default Minecraft click sounds? This resource pack upgrades every UI click with a smoother, cleaner, and more satisfying audio experience. Whether you're navigating menus, clicking buttons, or interacting with the interface, every click now feels more responsive and polished.

This pack is designed especially for players who love a minimal yet impactful improvement in their gameplay without changing the core Minecraft feel.

✨ Features:

• 🔊 Improved click sound with smooth and soft audio
• ⚡ More responsive and satisfying feedback
• 🎯 Perfect for PvP, menus, and fast clicking
• 🧼 Clean sound design – no distortion or harsh noise
• 🎮 Keeps the original Minecraft vibe but enhanced
